sql_array: CREATE TABLE test.visits(CounterID UInt32, StartDate Date, Sign Int8, IsNew UInt8, VisitID UInt64, UserID UInt64, Goals Nested(ID UInt32, Serial UInt32, EventTime DateTime) ) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY (CounterID, StartDate);
SELECT Goals.ID, Goals.EventTime FROM test.visits WHERE CounterID = 101500 LIMIT 10;
UPDATE test.visits SET Sign = 0 WHERE CounterID = 101500 AND length(Goals.ID) > 0;
SELECT Count(*) FROM test.visits ARRAY JOIN Goals AS Goal WHERE Goal.Serial > 1;
